title: Metal Tea Bag Squeezer, Stainless Steel Teabag Squeezer Tool Tea Bag Squeezer Tongs for Gripping Loosing Ice Sugar Lemon Slice
features: High Quality Materials: This tea bag squeezer is made of high quality stainless steel, which is durable and rustproof and will not affect the taste of your tea. It is a very suitable teabag squeezer for tea lovers

Easy to Use: Just press the teabag squeezer tool gently to effectively squeeze out every drop of fragrant tea in the tea bag. Easy to use. The convenient handheld size of this tea bag squeezer tongs allows you to easily reach into the cup without burning your fingers
Multi-purpose Design: In addition to squeezing tea bags, this tea squeezer can also be used to pick up sugar cubes, ice cubes, small snacks, etc., perfect for kitchen, office and outdoor activities

Easy to Clean and Store: The surface of our stainless steel tea bag squeezer is smooth and not easy to adhere to tea residue. It can be cleaned by rinsing with clear water. The tea bag squeezer tongs is compact and portable, easy to carry and store, and does not take up space
Ergonomic Handle: This tea filters coffee bag tong clamp has an ergonomically designed handle, comfortable grip, and good non-slip performance, allowing you to feel comfortable while enjoying tea
